RETIREMENT CHECKLIST

Federal Retirement Checklist: Everything You Need Before You Retire

Retiring from federal service involves dozens of decisions and deadlines. Missing a single requirement can delay your annuity payments or cost you thousands in lost benefits. This comprehensive checklist ensures nothing falls through the cracks.

GET YOUR PERSONALIZED CHECKLIST →

"Retire with confidence, not questions. The checklist ensures you didn't miss anything critical."

— Mike Stevens, IAR

Checklist Items

30+ action items

Timeline

12 months before retirement

Forms

SF-3107, SF-2823, etc.

Review

Personalized to your situation

Cost

Included

THE PROBLEM

Does This Sound Familiar?

You don't know what to do 5 years before retirement

The 5-year FEHB enrollment requirement, maximizing your high-3 salary, and understanding your FERS calculation all require action years before your planned retirement date.

You're overwhelmed by all the forms and deadlines

SF-3107, SF-2823, TSP-70, TSP-U-1, beneficiary designations, FEHB continuation — the paperwork is extensive and errors can delay your annuity for months.

You're afraid of missing critical deadlines

Open Season elections, TSP withdrawal decisions, Medicare enrollment, and retirement application submission all have specific windows. Missing one can have permanent consequences.

You don't know how long OPM takes to process

According to OPM, processing times can vary significantly. Planning for potential delays in receiving your full annuity is essential for avoiding financial stress.

THE SOLUTION

How We Help

Personalized Federal Retirement Timeline

We create a customized retirement checklist and timeline specific to your situation — mapping out exactly what you need to do at 5 years, 1 year, 6 months, 3 months, and 30 days before your planned retirement date.

Federal retirement involves coordinating FERS annuity applications, TSP withdrawal elections, FEHB continuation, FEGLI decisions, Social Security planning, and Medicare enrollment. Each has its own requirements, forms, and deadlines. We ensure you complete every step correctly and on time so your transition to retirement is smooth and your benefits start without delay.

Your Retirement Checklist Includes:

  • 5 Years Before: Verify FEHB enrollment, maximize high-3 salary, review FEGLI coverage
  • 1 Year Before: Attend retirement planning sessions, verify service credits, update beneficiaries
  • 6 Months Before: Decide survivor benefit election, plan TSP withdrawals, coordinate Social Security
  • 3 Months Before: Submit retirement application (SF-3107), finalize FEHB plan selection
  • 30 Days Before: Complete final certifications, arrange interim annuity, verify direct deposit
  • At Retirement: Enroll in Medicare (if eligible), file TSP withdrawal election, track OPM processing

How it Works

It's just three steps

BECOME A CLIENT
Step 1) Build Your Timeline ▾

Create a personalized retirement timeline based on your planned retirement date, mapping out every action item and deadline.

Step 2) Complete the Checklist ▾

Work through each phase systematically — verifying eligibility, making benefit elections, and completing required paperwork.

Step 3) Monitor & Adjust ▾

Track your retirement application with OPM, coordinate benefit start dates, and adjust plans as needed based on processing timelines.

Everything you need to know about preparing for federal retirement.
